column10: After camera was aimed at the hand, Five reached a stable label and generated the expected forward dry-run command.
Patched classifier produced intermittent PointLeft labels, but not enough consecutive frames to pass debounce=5.
A saved frame shows a clear side-on pointing gesture, but MediaPipe Hands did not produce stable landmarks in bridge logs. Treat as a vision robustness limitation.
Code was changed so gesture-mode JUMP also passes through stunt_armed guarding; requires a stable Thumb_up retest to quantify.
Five was detected briefly, but did not remain stable for debounce=3 during this 25 s retest; command stayed safe stop.
Zero labels appeared intermittently; no forward/turn/stunt command was generated.
Thumb_up reached stable label once; gesture-mode JUMP was correctly blocked by stunt_armed guard.
Hand removed from frame; bridge continued safe stop output.
